name: Manual
summary: the rider shifts their weight onto the tail of the board lifting the nose of the board while rolling.

name: Kickturn
summary: the rider shifts their weight onto the tail of the board lifting the nose of the board long enough to change their direction quickly while moving.

name: Ollie
summary: The foundational trick of skateboarding. The rider pops the tail of the board while sliding their front foot up to jump into the air with the board.

name: Shuvit
summary: The rider uses their backfoot to scoop the tail while doing a little hop to land on the board after it spins 180 degrees underneath them.

name: Pop Shuvit
summary: The rider pops and scoops the tail of the board then jumping to land on the board after it spins 180 degrees underneath them.

name: Heelflip
summary: The rider pops the tail of the board while sliding their foot up then flicking with their heel to flip the board underneath them.

name: Kickflip
summary: The rider pops the tail of the board while sliding their foot up then flicking with their feet to flip the board underneath them.

name: Varial Heelflip
summary: The rider combines a Heelflip with a Shuvit to flip the board while it spins 180° underneath them.

name: Varial Kickflip
summary: The rider combines a Kickflip with a Shuvit to flip the board while it spins 180° underneath them.

name: 360 Flip (Tre flip)
summary: The rider pops the tail of the board, scooping and flicking it to flip it while it spins 360° underneath them.
